nasb.text: and His garments became radiant and exceedingly white, as no launderer on earth can whiten them.

esv.text: and his clothes became radiant, intensely white, as no one on earth could bleach them.

cnv.text: 他的衣服閃耀發光，極其潔白，地上漂布的沒有能漂得這樣白的。

ccb.text: 衣服变得洁白放光，世上找不到漂得那么白的布。

csbs.text: 他的衣服变得光亮耀眼，极其洁白，地上漂布的人无法漂得那样白。
